title: Elatostema longipedunculatum
intro: Elatostema longipedunculatum, also known as Long-peduncled Elatostema, is a species of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae, native to tropical Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of various ailments, including fever, cough, and skin infections. Bioactive constituents of Elatostema longipedunculatum include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are believed to be responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Elatostema longipedunculatum is often made into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, or used in combination with other herbs in traditional formulations to treat various health conditions.
